scene.message: Mark: C-cut it out, Ma! I'm{nl} busy here! Go away, would ya!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Surely{wait_fr:21} she's{wait_fr:21}{nl} gone by now...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Aw crap~!{wait_fr:21} She's still{nl} here! Let's get out, {ctl0f:1}!{waitkey}{ret}
There seems to be no one{nl} here...{waitkey}{ret}
